title: convolvulus boissieri subsp. compactus
intro: Convolvulus boissieri subsp. compactus, also known as the dwarf morning glory, is a perennial plant species within the Convolvulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Convolvulus boissieri subsp. compactus include treating various ailments such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, often used in traditional medicine, and may also be used in topical applications to promote healing and soothe skin irritations.
